description: As a port meteorologist, prepare a seasonal heat advisory for maritime operations in the Persian Gulf based on the request at ~/Desktop/gulf_heat_advisory_request.txt. Using NASA Panoply, analyze Sea Surface Temperature (sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc) and Surface Air Temperature (air.mon.ltm.nc) from ~/PanoplyData/ for the month of August. Export the required plots for the Persian Gulf region and write a structured heat stress advisory report. Save all deliverables to ~/Documents/GulfHeat/ using the exact filenames and formats specified in the request.
